# Postpaid Plans UAE (postpaidplans.com)

> Postpaid Plans UAE is an authorized Etisalat dealer in the United Arab Emirates. The site offers a free interactive Plan Finder that recommends the best Etisalat postpaid plan based on a user's budget and usage (data, local calls, international calls, family or business), a side-by-side comparison of all 11 current Etisalat postpaid plans (AED 188–1,000/month), and a free premium mobile number with most plans. Orders are completed on WhatsApp (+971 56 902 8087) with same-day SIM delivery in Dubai, Abu Dhabi and Sharjah.

## Key facts
- Cheapest plan: Freedom Plan 250 — AED 188/month (non-stop data, 1,000 local minutes, free Silver number).
- Best for heavy data: Freedom Unlimited Data 500 — AED 300/month (unlimited high-speed data, 50% off from AED 600).
- Most popular: Unlimited Calls 600 Flexi — AED 360/month (unlimited flexi minutes local + international, 50GB data).
- Best for international calls to one country (e.g. Pakistan, India): Unlimited 1 Country Plan 325 — AED 325/month.
- Best for families / all-in-one: Gold Plan 500 — AED 500/month (unlimited data + unlimited calls + Gold number).
- Best for business: Local Data & Calls 1200 Flexi — AED 600/month (200GB data, 3,000 flexi minutes).
- UAE Nationals: Emirati Freedom — from AED 250/month (unlimited data + unlimited local calls; Emirati ID required).
- Premium tier: Platinum Plan — AED 1,000/month (unlimited everything + Platinum VIP number, 20GB roaming).
- Every plan includes a free premium number (Silver standard; Gold/Platinum on higher tiers).
- Contact: WhatsApp +971 56 902 8087. Service area: United Arab Emirates (same-day delivery Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah).

## Pages
- [Home + Plan Finder](https://postpaidplans.com/): interactive tool + full comparison table + FAQ.
- [Compare plans](https://postpaidplans.com/#compare): all Etisalat postpaid plans side by side.
- [Choose your number](https://postpaidplans.com/choose-number/): browse 2,500+ Silver, Gold and Platinum VIP numbers.
- [Arabic](https://postpaidplans.com/ar/): full Arabic version.

## Disclaimer
Postpaid Plans UAE is an independent authorized Etisalat dealer; it is not Etisalat by e&. Prices are promotional and set by Etisalat and may change.
